Author: Tori
Name: Lucky Split
Description:
Lucky Split gives venue hosts an easy-to-follow workflow for running in-game 50/50 drawings. Create reusable presets for each venue or recurring event, add an optional venue-funded starting pot, select nearby players when recording confirmed ticket sales, assign consecutive ticket ranges automatically, and monitor the total prize pool, winner payout, venue share, ticket revenue, ticket count, and entrant count from one styled dashboard.

The venue starting pot is combined with ticket revenue before the configured winner percentage is calculated. Close and reopen sales safely, use confirmation prompts for important actions, draw a reproducible winning ticket from the finalized ledger, copy ready-to-post announcements, review completed or voided drawings, and export purchase records to CSV.

Lucky Split does not move gil, complete trades, inspect balances, or send chat automatically. Venue staff remain responsible for confirming payments, recording purchases accurately, and distributing winnings.

Commands: /luckysplit, /lucky, /5050
Punchline: A polished 50/50 drawing console for FFXIV venues.
Changelog: Lucky Split 1.1.0 adds optional venue-funded starting pots. The starting pot joins ticket revenue before the configured winner percentage is calculated, with the remainder shown as the venue share. The amount is stored in presets, locked when sales open, and included in announcements, exports, history, and LSPLIT3 transparency receipts. This release also adds transaction and ledger revision metadata needed for future synchronized sales-team support.
